tasks.label: Commit and push JavaScript fixes
tasks.command:
git add . && git commit -m "fix: Resolve JavaScript syntax errors in expanded player database

- Escape apostrophes in player names (N'Diaye, D'Ambrosio, etc.)
- Fix 'Unexpected identifier' errors caused by unescaped apostrophes
- Ensure all 17,525 players load without JavaScript syntax errors
- Player names with apostrophes now properly escaped for compatibility

Database expansion from 572 to 17,525 players now fully functional." && git push origin master

tasks.label: Commit the fixes
tasks.command: git commit -m "fix: Resolve JavaScript syntax errors in expanded player database"

tasks.label: Commit the fixes
tasks.command: git commit -m 'fix: Resolve JavaScript syntax errors in expanded player database'

tasks.label: Commit the fixes
tasks.command: git commit -m "fix: JavaScript syntax errors resolved"
